nasb.text: Therefore in that day the Lord God of hosts called you to weeping, to wailing, To shaving the head and to wearing sackcloth.

esv.text: In that day the Lord God of hosts called for weeping and mourning, for baldness and wearing sackcloth;

cnv.text: 到那日，主萬軍之耶和華叫人哭泣哀號， 剃光頭髮，穿上麻布。

ccb.text: 那日，万军之耶和华呼召你们哭泣哀号， 剃光头发，身披麻衣。

csbs.text: 到那日， 主万军之耶和华呼吁你们哭泣哀号、 剃光头发、束上麻布。
